Headshot

"They should have killed him."

6.4
2016MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

A young man washes ashore, his memory gone - but his past comes back to haunt him after he is nursed back to health and his killing ability is needed when he takes on a powerful drug lord.

Tags

martial artsamnesiapost-traumatic stress disorder (ptsd)resistanceidentityredemptiongorerevengebrutalitydehumanizationgrittyviolenceintenseneo-exploition
